title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.350 - Petition for review shall state what
text:
272.350.  Petition for review shall state what. — The petition shall set forth the grounds of objection, and upon the filing thereof the circuit court shall be possessed of the cause, and proceed to hear and determine the objections, and make such order or judgment as may be right and just in the premises.
(L. 1963 p. 401 § 15)
